name: Braised Veal Shanks
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds veal shank, cut into equal pieces
recipeInstructions:
STEP ONE: Prepare Porcini Mushrooms--
Rehydrate porcini mushrooms in 1 cup warm water, then drain and reserve the liquid. Dice the mushrooms finely.
STEP TWO:
Season the veal shank with salt and pepper. Dust with flour. In an ovenproof pan, brown the veal in hot olive oil until golden. Remove the veal from the pan. Add the next five ingredients to the pan, sautéing until browned. Add the reserved mushroom liquid and wine to the vegetables, reducing the liquid by half. Add the mushrooms and veal stock. Bring to a boil. Cover with foil and bake in a preheated 375-degree F oven for approximately 2 hours. Remove meat from juices. Keep warm. Reduce the juices by half and pour over the veal. Serve with risotto on the side.
